channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bags of Rubbish, 1st July
item.description:
There are bags of rubbish left inside Scholars Court. There is also a tyre under a nearby hedge as well. I don't know if an uplift has already been arranged or if this rubbish has been there for a while. ///brand.spend.fade https://w3w.co/brand.spend.fade

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Scholars Court, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of Rubbish, 1st July
item.description:
Inside Scholars Court are bags of rubbish and a tyre under a hedge. I don't know if an uplift has already been arranged or if it has been there for some time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Scholars Court, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rocking slab outside 31 Arle Gardens, 1st July
item.description:
Further to report (Cracked Paving Slab) 22116467, I am writing to confirm that the damaged slab is located outside 31 Arle Gardens (not 41). Apologies for the confusion. ///model.inches.takes https://w3w.co/model.inches.takes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Arle Gardens, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 1st July
item.description:
Give and take 28 day please cut back overgrown vegetation and brambles and stinging netals back to boundary approx 40 metres x1 meters (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 1st July
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please cut back overhanging tree branches approx 15 meters x3 meters (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree down blocking the route, 1st July
item.description:
Tree has fallen and is mostly blocking the path/cycle way part of Pheasant Lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Pheasant Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 1st July
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole 500x300x40mm plus x 9 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 1st July
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole 500x320x40mm (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue car has been abandoned for about 3 months, 1st July
item.description:
Car left in the entrance to Shipton golf course. It blocks visibility for drivers exiting the golf course and the football ground.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A436, Andoversford, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 1st July
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please repair x1 chipped kerb stone with concrete fillet 220x100x40mm (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 1st July
item.description:
Permanent repair give and take 28 days please temporary footway closure please take up raised slabs and ramp up over tree roots 8500x1000 x30mm stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 1st July
item.description:
NWD Give and take make safe PLEASE BRING X2 UNEVEN FOOTWAY BOARDS OUT PLACE IN AREA AROUND NUMBER 47 (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 1st July
item.description:
Road closure 28 day please cut back overgrown hedge and vegetation and brambles back to boundary approx 300 metres x3 meters (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 1st July
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day please cut back overgrown hedge and vegetation and brambles back to boundary approx 38 metres x2 meters (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement completely blocked, 1st July
item.description:
One of two sections of the pavement that are totally overgrown with brambles/nettles/thistles. Causes pedestrians/runners to have to use the road and this is a VERY fast road and consequently very dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Piffs Elm Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nettles, brambles and thistles, 1st July
item.description:
There is no pavement on the opposite side of the road and so the blockage means people have to walk in the road - it's VERY dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole has emerged in the centre of the B4070 after Buckholt road toward Stroud, 1st July
item.description:
On the B4070 proceeding from Birdlip to Stroud and after the Buckholt Road junction a pothole has emerged near the centre of the road near the white line. It gives your suspension a jolt when you can't avoid.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): B4070, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaf litter and tree debris all along All Saints Road. Needs collecting before it becomes mud again / vegetation takes root in it / it obscures road markings., 1st July
item.description:
All along All Saints Road from the roundabout with Pittville Circus Road up to the junction with Winstonian Road. Leaf litter and tree debris will quickly dissolve into mud which obscures road markings and pavement defects (causing people to fall over). Please can you clear it as quickly as you can before it rains.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68, All Saints' Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead trees on footpath in danger of falling on pedestrians and blocking right of way., 1st July
item.description:
Clump of trees 30m and 60m up right of way fro willow farm gate. Dead trees in deteriorating conditions.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 1st July
item.description:
NWD Give and take 15 db make safe carriage way pothole 700x600x75mm (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet
